text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Mental & Behavioral Health > Sober Living Homes * Men 4 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Refine Results - Select - No Filter Men Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF BLANCHET HOUSE OF HOSPITALITY BLANCHET FARM RESIDENTIAL RECOVERY BLANCHET FARM PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides clean and sober housing and a working farm offering support that will allow a person to gain sobriety and take the necessary steps to become self-sufficient again. AA and NA support groups help build a foundation in recovery and the connection of friendships by working and living together towards a common goal. 11750 NE Finn Hill Loop Carlton, OR 97111 Eligibility: Men age 18 and older Hours: Farm Manager: Monday-Friday 7:30am-4pm Case Manager: Tuesday-Friday 9am-5pm Email (503) 241-4340 11 Get Directions Visit Website More Details HOUSE OF HOPE MINISTRIES HOUSING PROGRAMS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers supportive housing and alcohol and drug-free shared homes. 724 SW 14th Street Redmond, OR 97756 Eligibility: Age 18 and older men who are sober and drug-free Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 390-1594 Get Directions Visit Website More Details SOARING HEIGHTS RECOVERY HOMES FALCON HOUSE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides sober housing. Clients work towards achieving self sufficiency, family reunification, and permanent housing by establishing stable work and rental histories. Eligibility: Single men and men with minor children Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (971) 719-4963 Get Directions Visit Website More Details SOARING HEIGHTS RECOVERY HOMES OSPREY HOME Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides sober housing. Clients work towards achieving self sufficiency, family reunification, and permanent housing by establishing stable work and rental histories.
